_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Conduct data and AI workforce planning, including current-state skills assessment, future-state requirements modeling, gap analysis, and talent acquisition and development strategy formulation.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-T-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-T-014 (DG, cosine: 0.510), AI-T-018 (AI, cosine: 0.483).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.521). Shared vocabulary: [analysis, conduct]. DCWF-only terms [research, target] vs WIDAI-only terms [acquisition, ai, assessment, current, data, development] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.882 (P=0.918, R=0.848). P exceeds R by 0.070 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 22 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.5%). "Conduct target research and analysis." and "Conduct data and AI workforce planning, including current-state skills assessmen" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.511 ≈ STS 0.521 (gap 0.010). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [analysis, conduct] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.0%. Shared tokens: [analysis, conduct]. DCWF-only: [research, target]. WIDAI-only: [acquisition, ai, assessment, current, data, development].
